zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Tailboys於大約1335年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德賀普爾時，他的父親William Tailboys21歲，母親Margaret Egglescliffe37歲。他和Eleanor Burradon至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1369年2月23日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯塔林波洛享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 吉。

meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Taillebois (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Tailboys was born about 1335, in Hepple, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Tailboys, was 21 and his mother, Margaret Egglescliffe, was 37. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Eleanor Burradon. He died on 23 February 1369, in Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35, and was buried in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Tailboys est né environ 1335, à Hepple, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Tailboys, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Egglescliffe, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Eleanor Burradon. Il est décédé le 23 février 1369, à Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Tailboys um 1335 in Hepple, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Tailboys 21 und seine Mutter Margaret Egglescliffe 37. Er hatte mit Eleanor Burradon mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. Februar 1369 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Tailboys è nato il circa 1335 nel Hepple, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Tailboys, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Egglescliffe, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Eleanor Burradon. Morì il 23 febbraio 1369, nel Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Tailboysが約1335年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドヘップルで生まれた時，父William Tailboysは21歳，母Margaret Egglescliffeは37歳であった。彼はEleanor Burradonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1369年2月23日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタリングボロウで35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース クイメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Tailboys(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 헤플에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Tailboys(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Egglescliffe(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Eleanor Burradon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 2월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스탤링버루그h에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르스 키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Tailboys nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Hepple, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Tailboys, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Egglescliffe, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Eleanor Burradon. Ele faleceu em 23 de fevereiro de 1369, em Stallingborough, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Tailboys родился около 1335 г. в местности хеппл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Tailboys было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Egglescliffe, 37. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Eleanor Burradon. Он умер 23 февраля 1369 г. в местности сталлингбороую, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности норт ким, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
